description: Letter from Sahlān b. [...] to Abū Zakariyyā. Dating: mid-11th century. Regarding a silk binding that a Spanish person gave the addressee with instructions who should receive it. The binding belonged to Abū l-Faraj Yeshaʿya's assistant. The addressee does not give it, because he thinks that it belongs to the writer, and the writer owes him money. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #768) VMR
